name: Inspectah Deck
bio: Inspectah Deck (Jason Hunter) is an American rapper, producer, and member of the Wu-Tang Clan. He is known for his sharp lyricism and memorable verses on classic Wu-Tang tracks like 'C.R.E.A.M.' and 'Triumph'.
facts: Also a member of the hip-hop supergroup Czarface.
Produced tracks for Wu-Tang Clan and other artists.
